mapper.sql: sim_id, sim_nm, owner_user_id, scope_se_cd, scope_oprtr_id, base_yr, prdctn_yr_from, prdctn_yr_to, input_json::text AS input_json, rslt_json::text AS rslt_json, share_se_cd, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ptl.tn_ptl_sim WHERE sim_id = #{simId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()

SELECT FROM ptl.tn_ptl_sim WHERE use_end_dt > NOW()
ORDER BY frst_reg_dt DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ptl.tn_ptl_sim WHERE use_end_dt > NOW()
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(sim_id, 3)::int), 0) FROM ptl.tn_ptl_sim WHERE sim_id LIKE 'SM%' AND SUBSTRING(sim_id, LENGTH('SM') + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ptl.tn_ptl_sim ( sim_id, sim_nm, owner_user_id, scope_se_cd, scope_oprtr_id, base_yr, prdctn_yr_from, prdctn_yr_to, input_json, rslt_json, share_se_cd, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{simId}, #{simNm}, #{ownerUserId}, #{scopeSeCd}, #{scopeOprtrId}, #{baseYr}, #{prdctnYrFrom}, #{prdctnYrTo}, #{inputJson}::jsonb, #{rsltJson}::jsonb, COALESCE(#{shareSeCd}, 'PRIVATE'), NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ptl.tn_ptl_sim SET sim_nm = #{simNm}, scope_se_cd = #{scopeSeCd}, scope_oprtr_id = #{scopeOprtrId}, base_yr = #{baseYr}, prdctn_yr_from = #{prdctnYrFrom}, prdctn_yr_to = #{prdctnYrTo}, input_json = #{inputJson}::jsonb, rslt_json = #{rsltJson}::jsonb, share_se_cd = #{shareSeCd}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE sim_id = #{simId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
